---
title: "pca and geographical distribution of sorghum"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-08-04"
output: html_document
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE) 
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir=normalizePath('..//..//')) 
```

```{r}
  library(tidyverse)
  library(readxl)
  library(maps)
  library(ggforce)
  library(patchwork)

# ---------- Inputs ----------
sap_csv   <- "data/1.pca_geo/tpj15853-sup-0001-files1 (1).csv"
sorgsd_xl <- "data/1.pca_geo/13068_2021_2016_MOESM1_ESM (1).xlsx"
pca_vec   <- "data/1.pca_geo/pca.eigenvec"
pca_val   <- "data/1.pca_geo/pca.eigenval"
# ---------- Outputs ----------
#out_png   <- "graphs/01_publication/pca_geo_subpops.png"
out_pdf   <- "graphs/01_publication/1.pca_geo/pca_geo_subpops.pdf"

# ---------- Load data: SAP ----------
sap_data <- read.csv(sap_csv)[, c(1, 2, 5)]
colnames(sap_data) <- c("Pinumber", "cluster", "Country")
sap_cluster_names <- c("1" = "durra", "2" = "kafir", "3" = "caudatum",
                       "4" = "milo/durra-bicolor", "5" = "mixed/bicolor", "6" = "guinea")
sap_data <- sap_data %>%
  mutate(cluster = as.character(cluster),
         ClusterName = sap_cluster_names[cluster],
         Set = "SAP") %>%
  filter(!is.na(ClusterName)) %>%
  select(Pinumber, ClusterName, Set, Country)

# ---------- Load data: SorGSD ----------
sorgsd_data <- read_excel(sorgsd_xl)
colnames(sorgsd_data) <- sorgsd_data[1, ]
sorgsd_data <- sorgsd_data[-1, c(1, 5, 6)]  # PI, Country, cluster
colnames(sorgsd_data) <- c("Pinumber", "Country", "cluster")
sorgsd_data$cluster[sorgsd_data$cluster == "Weedy"] <- "Wild sorghum"
sorgsd_data <- sorgsd_data[sorgsd_data$cluster != "S.propinquum", ]
sorgsd_data <- sorgsd_data %>%
  mutate(ClusterName = case_when(
    cluster == "Improved" ~ "Improved",
    cluster == "Landrace" ~ "Landrace",
    cluster == "Wild sorghum" ~ "Wild sorghum",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  ),
  Set = "SorGSD") %>%
  filter(!is.na(ClusterName)) %>%
  select(Pinumber, ClusterName, Set, Country)
# ---------- Combine data ----------
all_meta <- bind_rows(sap_data, sorgsd_data)

# ---------- Load PCA ----------
merged_pca <- read.table(pca_vec, header = FALSE)
colnames(merged_pca) <- c("FID", "IID", paste0("PC", 1:(ncol(merged_pca) - 2)))

# ---------- Merge ----------
pca_annotated <- inner_join(merged_pca, all_meta, by = c("IID" = "Pinumber"))

# ---------- Reassign Landrace/Improved to nearest SAP centroid ----------
sap_centroids <- pca_annotated %>%
  filter(ClusterName %in% c("durra", "kafir", "caudatum",
                            "milo/durra-bicolor", "mixed/bicolor", "guinea")) %>%
  group_by(ClusterName) %>%
  summarise(PC1_mean = mean(PC1), PC2_mean = mean(PC2), .groups = "drop")

assign_to_sap <- function(pc1, pc2, centroids) {
  dists <- sqrt((centroids$PC1_mean - pc1)^2 + (centroids$PC2_mean - pc2)^2)
  centroids$ClusterName[which.min(dists)]
}

pca_annotated <- pca_annotated %>%
  mutate(ClusterName_new = ifelse(
    ClusterName %in% c("Landrace", "Improved"),
    mapply(assign_to_sap, PC1, PC2, MoreArgs = list(centroids = sap_centroids)),
    ClusterName
  ))

# ---------- Colors ----------
color_vec <- c(
  "durra" = "#FF7F00", "kafir" = "#E69F00", "caudatum" = "#984EA3",
  "milo/durra-bicolor" = "#F781BF", "mixed/bicolor" = "#A6A6A6",
  "guinea" = "#56B4E9", "Wild sorghum" = "#4DAF4A"
)
shape_vec <- c(
  "durra" = 16, "kafir" = 16, "caudatum" = 16,
  "milo/durra-bicolor" = 16, "mixed/bicolor" = 16,
  "guinea" = 16, "Wild sorghum" = 17
)
a4_width_in <- 21 / 2.54
a4_height_in <- 29.7 / 2.54
# ---------- Variance ----------
eigenvalues <- scan(pca_val)
variance_explained <- eigenvalues / sum(eigenvalues) * 100
PC1_var <- variance_explained[1]; PC2_var <- variance_explained[2]

# ---------- PCA plot ----------
pca_plot <- ggplot(pca_annotated, aes(PC1, PC2, color = ClusterName_new, shape = ClusterName_new)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_vec, name = NULL) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_vec, name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.02)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.02)) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "on") +
  labs(x = paste0("PC1 (", round(PC1_var, 1), "%)"),
       y = paste0("PC2 (", round(PC2_var, 1), "%)")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),     # not bold
    #legend.position = "bottom",
    #legend.text  = element_text(size = 11),
    plot.margin = margin(6, 8, 6, 6)
  )

# ---------- Map pie chart ----------
world <- map_data("world")
centroids <- world %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  summarise(long = mean(range(long)), lat = mean(range(lat)), .groups = "drop")

map_df <- pca_annotated %>%
  left_join(centroids, by = c("Country" = "region")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(long))

pie_data <- map_df %>%
  group_by(Country, long, lat, ClusterName_new) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Country) %>%
  mutate(prop  = n / sum(n),
         angle = 2 * pi * cumsum(prop),
         start = lag(angle, default = 0),
         end   = angle,
         r     = 5)

map_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = world, aes(long, lat, group = group),
               fill = "white", color = "gray70", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_arc_bar(data = pie_data,
               aes(x0 = long, y0 = lat, r0 = 0, r = r,
                   start = start, end = end, fill = ClusterName_new),
               alpha = 0.55, color = "black", linewidth = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_vec, name = NULL, guide = "none") +
  coord_quickmap(xlim = c(-178, 178), ylim = c(-58, 83), expand = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 8)
  )

# ---------- Combine ----------
combined <- (map_plot | pca_plot) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1), guides = "collect")

# center the single legend
combined <- combined &
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.box.just = "center",
    legend.box.margin = margin(0),
    legend.margin = margin(0),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 6)
  )

combined <- combined & guides(colour = guide_legend(nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE))

# ---------- Save ----------
#ggsave(out_png, combined, width = 12, height = 4.5, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
ggsave(out_pdf, combined, width = 12, height = 4.5)
ggsave("graphs/01_publication/1.pca_geo/map_plot.pdf", map_plot, width = a4_width_in, height = a4_height_in)
ggsave("graphs/01_publication/1.pca_geo/pca_plot.pdf", pca_plot, width = a4_width_in, height = a4_height_in)

```


```{r}
library(stringr)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)

extract_pi <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  pi_raw <- str_extract(x, regex("PI\\s*\\d+", ignore_case = TRUE))
  pi_norm <- ifelse(
    is.na(pi_raw),
    NA_character_,
    toupper(gsub("\\s+", "", pi_raw))
  )
  pi_norm
}

mcpd_file <- "/Users/subhashmahamkali/Downloads/MCPD - 885fec74-9578-436e-91cf-e0e2fe49e998.xlsx"
mcpd <- read_excel(mcpd_file, sheet = "MCPD")

mcpd_clean <- mcpd %>%
  mutate(
    PI_from_accenumb = extract_pi(ACCENUMB),
    PI_from_donor    = extract_pi(DONORNUMB),
    PI_from_other    = extract_pi(OTHERNUMB),
    PI_from_coll     = extract_pi(COLLNUMB),
    Pinumber = coalesce(PI_from_accenumb, PI_from_donor, PI_from_other, PI_from_coll),
    Latitude = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(DECLATITUDE)),
    Longitude = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(DECLONGITUDE))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Pinumber)) %>%
  select(Pinumber, Latitude, Longitude) %>%
  distinct(Pinumber, .keep_all = TRUE)

head(mcpd_clean)

# In your PCA table
pca_annotated <- pca_annotated %>%
  mutate(IID_norm = toupper(gsub("\\s+", "", IID)))

# In MCPD table
mcpd_clean <- mcpd_clean %>%
  mutate(Pinumber_norm = toupper(gsub("\\s+", "", Pinumber)))
# unique IDs from each
pca_ids  <- unique(pca_annotated$IID_norm)
mcpd_ids <- unique(mcpd_clean$Pinumber_norm)

# overlap IDs
overlap_ids <- intersect(pca_ids, mcpd_ids)

length(pca_ids)       # total PCA IDs
length(mcpd_ids)      # total MCPD PI IDs extracted
length(overlap_ids)   # overlap count
round(100 * length(overlap_ids) / length(pca_ids), 1)  # % of PCA covered

```
```{r}
# ---------- Map pie chart (UPDATED: add dispersal arrows) ----------
library(grid)  # for arrow()

world <- map_data("world")

# country centroids (same as your code)
centroids <- world %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  summarise(long = mean(range(long)),
            lat  = mean(range(lat)),
            .groups = "drop")

map_df <- pca_annotated %>%
  left_join(centroids, by = c("Country" = "region")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(long))

pie_data <- map_df %>%
  group_by(Country, long, lat, ClusterName_new) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Country) %>%
  mutate(
    prop  = n / sum(n),
    angle = 2 * pi * cumsum(prop),
    start = lag(angle, default = 0),
    end   = angle,
    r     = 5
  )

# ---- Dispersal arrows (schematic) ----
# You can tweak these coordinates to match your aesthetic.
routes <- tibble::tribble(
  ~route,                 ~x,  ~y,  ~xend, ~yend, ~curv, ~label,
  "Within Africa",         35,  10,   -5,   15,    0.25, "Africa spread",
  "To South Asia",         40,  12,   78,   22,    0.20, "To South Asia",
  "To East Asia",          85,  28,  115,   38,    0.15, "To East Asia",
  "To Americas",           10,  12,  -60,   12,   -0.20, "To Americas"
) %>%
  mutate(
    xm = (x + xend) / 2,
    ym = (y + yend) / 2
  )

map_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(
    data = world,
    aes(long, lat, group = group),
    fill = "white", color = "gray70", linewidth = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_arc_bar(
    data = pie_data,
    aes(x0 = long, y0 = lat, r0 = 0, r = r,
        start = start, end = end, fill = ClusterName_new),
    alpha = 0.55, color = "black", linewidth = 0.1
  ) +
  # arrows
geom_curve(
  data = routes,
  aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend, curvature = curv),
  linewidth = 0.7,
  color = "black",
  arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.16, "inches"), type = "closed")
) +
# labels (optional)
geom_label(
  data = routes,
  aes(x = xm, y = ym, label = label),
  size = 3,
  label.size = 0.15,
  fill = "white",
  alpha = 0.9
)
map_plot
```
